Name: Custom PCB
Purpose: hold all of the FC components

Name: 1mm pitch connectors
Purpose: allows connecting standard drone peripherals to the FC

Name: APM2.5 power monitor
Purpose: measures the power and current off the battery to enter failsafe mode when battery about to die

Name: Propellers
Purpose: provides the motors a way to generate lift

Name: Power distribution board
Purpose: sends power from the battery to all 4 escs

Name: BLHeli-s 20A ESCs
Purpose: provides power and control to the motor

Name: HGLRC M100-5883 GPS and Compass
Purpose: Provides location and heading data to the FC

Name: ICM-42688 IMU
Purpose: Tells the drone its orientation and acceleration

Name: STM32H743VIT6
Purpose: Will be the brains of the drone
